taskDescription: Complete the crossword using terms from scalp anatomy.

words.clue: Fibromuscular sheet connecting frontalis and occipitalis muscles
Dangerous fourth layer of the scalp where infection spreads freely
Valveless veins connecting scalp veins to intracranial dural venous sinuses
Artery from the ophthalmic artery supplying the anterior scalp above the orbit
External carotid branch that is the main artery of the lateral scalp
Nerve from dorsal ramus of C2 supplying the posterior scalp
Innermost layer of the scalp tightly adherent to bone
Type of anaesthesia achieved by infiltrating around the head to block all scalp nerves
Birth injury haematoma beneath the pericranium that does not cross suture lines
Muscle of the scalp that raises the eyebrows and wrinkles the forehead
